message.content:
@startuml
title Send file to inbox

actor "User" as User
participant "REST" as REST
participant "Lookup Service" as LookupService
participant "VFS Service" as VFS
participant "Storage Service" as StorageService
participant "S3" as S3

User -> REST: get User2 inbox info (login/password)
REST -> LookupService: User2 public key and /inbox access creds
LookupService -> REST: User2 public key and /inbox access creds
REST -> StorageService: encrypt and save file to user's inbox location
StorageService -> S3: persistence
S3 -> StorageService: success
StorageService -> User: success

@enduml
